name: Pi-hole
description: Block ads on your entire network
compose:
name: slashnode-pi-hole
services:
  server:
    image: pihole/pihole:2026.06.0
    container_name: pi-hole
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
    network_mode: host
    environment:
      FTLCONF_webserver_api_password: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      FTLCONF_webserver_port: 8082,[::]:8082
      FTLCONF_dns_listeningMode: all
    volumes:
      - server_data-pihole:/etc/pihole/
      - server_data-dnsmasq:/etc/dnsmasq.d/
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-pihole:
    name: slashnode-pi-hole_server_data-pihole
  server_data-dnsmasq:
    name: slashnode-pi-hole_server_data-dnsmasq
notes: Ported from Umbrel (pi-hole). Upstream: https://pi-hole.net. Runs in host network mode and binds the host's DNS/web ports directly — it is NOT behind Caddy/Tor. Set its web password from the app's own settings. ⚠️ server: extra capabilities ["NET_ADMIN"]; server: host network mode — bypasses Caddy/Tor isolation, binds host interfaces directly.
